{{Quote|Can anyone think of anything that might help?|Captain Reldo Dovlis to his bridge crew moments before the [[Peacekeeper (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peacekeeper'']]{{'s}} destruction|<ref name="The Hutt Gambit">''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''</ref>}}
'''Reldo Dovlis''' was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] [[Peacekeeper (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peacekeeper'']] at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. He was killed when ''Peacekeeper'' was sent hurtling into [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa's]] [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]].
{{Char-stub}}
